title: LinkedIn post from chat (first workflow)

summary: Chat-triggered AI agent that turns a topic into an engaging LinkedIn post using Google Gemini and can publish via the LinkedIn tool, with short conversation memory.
notes: Introductory workflow: agent writes LinkedIn-style content from user messages; credentials must be configured in your n8n instance after import.
